post.subject: Well.... that was shit
post.body: Is it just me? Parties are supposed to be fun, right? I would put it mostly down to the fact that i didnt know most of the people and most of the time they were talking about some crap that i dont know anything about nor care about, such as soaps, comics and movies i havent seen. I was smokin a lot of pot... i dont know if it has anything to do with it, i would really say it does, but sort of in a way i guess it does. Or maybe they just arent my sorta people. Whatever it was... i didnt really like sitting there all day on my own... smoking. Went to bed at about 3am, and managed to sleep quite well actually. Got up about 2pm. I do love it when i have nothing to get up for and i really can just stay in bed until i am no longer tired. I got up and went on the PC for a while then came home. Its oh so boring. I did manage to do something in trying to get another job. I emailed a local company my CV yesterday, got an application from somewhere else and asked around a few other places. But until then i will be doing my usual crap ... ABSOLUTELY FUCK ALL. FUN FUN.
